'''shatate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:idiopathically|idiopathically]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-t-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:idiopathically|idiopathically]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| shatate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:shatate|shatate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:shatatesher|shatatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shatatesherĂ«m|shatatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:shatatero|shatatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shatateshĂ«|shatateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shatateshĂ«m|shatateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokishatatero|gokishatatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishatateshĂ«|gokishatateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishatateshĂ«m|gokishatateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:goshatankerom|goshatankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshatankeshĂ«|goshatankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshatankeshĂ«m|goshatankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:goshatankeya|goshatankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:shataterom|shataterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shatatemu|shatatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:shatateya|shatateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokishataterom|gokishataterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishatatemu|gokishatatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokishatateya|gokishatateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:shatatate|shatatate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:shatatatesher|shatatatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shatatatesherĂ«m|shatatatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:shatatatero|shatatatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shatatateshĂ«|shatatateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shatatateshĂ«m|shatatateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokishatatatero|gokishatatatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishatatateshĂ«|gokishatatateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishatatateshĂ«m|gokishatatateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:goshatatankerom|goshatatankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshatatankeshĂ«|goshatatankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshatatankeshĂ«m|goshatatankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:goshatatankeya|goshatatankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:shatataterom|shatataterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shatatatemu|shatatatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:shatatateya|shatatateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokishatataterom|gokishatataterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishatatatemu|gokishatatatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokishatatateya|gokishatatateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:shĂŠtĂŠte|shĂŠtĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:shĂŠtĂŠtesher|shĂŠtĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shĂŠtĂŠtesherĂ«m|shĂŠtĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:shĂŠtĂŠtero|shĂŠtĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shĂŠtĂŠteshĂ«|shĂŠtĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shĂŠtĂŠteshĂ«m|shĂŠtĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokishĂŠtĂŠtero|gokishĂŠtĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishĂŠtĂŠteshĂ«|gokishĂŠtĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishĂŠtĂŠteshĂ«m|gokishĂŠtĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:goshĂŠtĂŠnkerom|goshĂŠtĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshĂŠtĂŠnkeshĂ«|goshĂŠtĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshĂŠtĂŠnkeshĂ«m|goshĂŠtĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:goshĂŠtĂŠnkeya|goshĂŠtĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:shĂŠtĂŠterom|shĂŠtĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shĂŠtĂŠtemu|shĂŠtĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:shĂŠtĂŠteya|shĂŠtĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokishĂŠtĂŠterom|gokishĂŠtĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishĂŠtĂŠtemu|gokishĂŠtĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokishĂŠtĂŠteya|gokishĂŠtĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:shaftafte|shaftafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:shaftaftesher|shaftaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shaftaftesherĂ«m|shaftaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:shaftaftero|shaftaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shaftafteshĂ«|shaftafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shaftafteshĂ«m|shaftafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokishaftaftero|gokishaftaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishaftafteshĂ«|gokishaftafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishaftafteshĂ«m|gokishaftafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:goshaftafnkerom|goshaftafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshaftafnkeshĂ«|goshaftafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshaftafnkeshĂ«m|goshaftafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:goshaftafnkeya|goshaftafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:shaftafterom|shaftafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shaftaftemu|shaftaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:shaftafteya|shaftafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokishaftafterom|gokishaftafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishaftaftemu|gokishaftaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokishaftafteya|gokishaftafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
